device: replace with output device, such as USB-C EarPods, laptop speakers, wired DAC, or headphones
route: Axiom JamesDSP Controller, same capture/output route for both scripts

material.label: centered vocal or piano item, local title redacted if public
material.license_scope: local listening only unless this is public-domain material
material.timestamp_or_excerpt: replace with local timestamp or excerpt window
material.notes: Listen for center image, vocal/piano focus, low-mid blur, and whether the fixture feels smaller.

material.label: dense electronic or modern pop item, local title redacted if public
material.license_scope: local listening only unless this is public-domain material
material.timestamp_or_excerpt: replace with local timestamp or excerpt window
material.notes: Listen for high-frequency openness, shimmer, fatigue, stereo image stability, and perceived aliveness.

material.label: hip-hop, kick-forward, or bass-forward item, local title redacted if public
material.license_scope: local listening only unless this is public-domain material
material.timestamp_or_excerpt: replace with local timestamp or excerpt window
material.notes: Listen for kick focus, bass anchoring, bass-image coupling, and whether reduced width weakens impact.

observations.bass: replace with whether bass remains anchored and full, loses size, or becomes clearer with the width fixture
observations.punch: replace with whether kick/snare/transient focus improves, stays the same, or weakens
observations.center_image: replace with whether centered vocal, kick, snare, or piano stays more stable on .11 or the width fixture
observations.lateral_spread: replace with whether the fixture reduces excessive spread or makes the mix feel too narrow
observations.localization_blur: replace with whether source positions are clearer, unchanged, or more smeared
observations.depth_impression: replace with whether depth feels preserved, flatter, or more stable
observations.bass_image_coupling: replace with whether bass weight stays attached to kick/center/main image
observations.width: replace with whether accepted .11 or the width fixture has the preferred stereo size
observations.air: replace with whether high-frequency air stays open or becomes dull/shimmery
observations.harshness: replace with whether either script makes bright material sharper or smoother
observations.loudness: replace with whether one script feels louder after fair level handling
observations.fatigue: replace with whether repeated listening is easier on .11 or the width fixture
observations.route_context: replace with output device, crossfeed state, Windows source endpoint, and processed output endpoint
observations.artifacts: replace with any pumping, crackle, image movement, dullness, or none heard
observations.overall: replace with .11 preferred, width lab preferred, material dependent, no reliable difference, or stop this path
